series_metadata.series_description: These records include the bid prospectus; timber bids/bid opening results; communication letters between state and contractor; revenue receipts from all payments towards contract; cutting and logging inspection sheets; maps marking harvest area; the signed timber sale agreement; letter of credit and release of letter of credit; final letter to officially close the contract.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: permanently. ; Paper: permanently. If scanned and saved in an electronic format, paper copy can be destroyed at that time
